# agent-skills snapshot for iLongRun v0.6.0

- Source repository: https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills
- Source commit: `1068b1b498f3223a08242402217fec4efc35dcb8`
- Snapshot date: `2026-04-07`
- Purpose: provide a vendored, reviewable baseline for the iLongRun Coding Swarm Protocol.

This snapshot is **not** consumed directly at runtime. Runtime behavior is defined by:

- `config/coding-protocol.jsonc`
- `skills/ilongrun-coding/*`
- `agents/ilongrun-*.agent.md`
- `scripts/_ilongrun_lib.py` and related helpers

Selected upstream skills included in this snapshot:

- using-agent-skills
- spec-driven-development
- planning-and-task-breakdown
- context-engineering
- incremental-implementation
- test-driven-development
- debugging-and-error-recovery
- code-review-and-quality
- security-and-hardening
- performance-optimization
- documentation-and-adrs
- git-workflow-and-versioning
- shipping-and-launch
